events.name: Apparition
events.description: A ghostly figure appears before you.

events.name: Cold Spot
events.description: The temperature drops dramatically. Your breath becomes visible.

events.name: Possession Attempt
events.description: You feel something trying to take control of your body.

events.name: Whispers
events.description: Voices speak directly into your ear, too quiet to understand.

events.name: Shadow Figure
events.description: A dark shape moves across the wall with impossible speed.

events.name: Telekinesis
events.description: Objects move on their own around you.

events.name: Mirror Entity
events.description: Your reflection doesn't quite match your movements.

events.name: Poltergeist Activity
events.description: Doors slam violently on their own. Things are thrown.
